# EnterIT

> EnterIT is a European AI and software delivery partner. Our 75+ specialists design, build, integrate, and operate enterprise software, AI solutions, cloud platforms, and system integrations for mid-to-large companies and technology partners. Primary language of the site is Czech (cs); English, German, and Polish versions are available at /en, /de, /pl. A separate US partner page is available at /us.

EnterIT is the delivery/execution team of the sister company EnterAI (enterai.cz), which focuses on AI adoption strategy and transformation. EnterIT focuses specifically on hands-on delivery: building and operating the actual automations, agents, and integrations — both as EnterAI's delivery arm and as standalone IT/AI projects for direct clients. EnterIT does not do adoption/change-management consulting — that is EnterAI's role.

Legal entity: AI Enter s.r.o. (brand: EnterIT), Bruntál, Czech Republic.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://enterit.cz/): engineering-first overview of enterprise software and AI delivery from design through production, with structured case studies, integrations, process, savings calculator, operations, leadership, and the relationship to EnterAI.
- [US Partner Page](https://enterit.cz/us): dedicated page for US consultancies, Microsoft partners, and systems integrators looking for a European AI and software delivery partner.
- [Team](https://enterit.cz/tym.html): the ~75-person engineering team across three groups: Enterprise (ERP/system integration), Agents (AI agent development), and Studio (product/in-house builds).
- [How we build agents](https://enterit.cz/jak-stavime-agenty.html): technical anatomy of an AI agent build including architecture, guardrails, human-in-the-loop, and security.
- [How we build automations](https://enterit.cz/jak-stavime-automatizace.html): the 5-layer automation stack and 4-phase delivery process.

## Ready-made solutions (reseni-*.html)

- [Invoice automation](https://enterit.cz/reseni-faktury.html): AI extraction of incoming invoices into ERP.
- [Order intake automation](https://enterit.cz/reseni-objednavky.html): automatic order capture from e-mail into ERP.
- [Complaints handling](https://enterit.cz/reseni-reklamace.html): automated complaint intake and routing.
- [Paperless warehouse](https://enterit.cz/reseni-sklad-bez-papiru.html): warehouse operations without paper delivery notes.
- [Attendance tracking](https://enterit.cz/reseni-dochazka.html): automated attendance/timesheet capture.
- [Leave approval automation](https://enterit.cz/reseni-dovolene.html): automated leave request and approval flow.
- [Vehicle logbook automation](https://enterit.cz/reseni-kniha-jizd.html): automated mileage/logbook tracking.
- [Work report automation](https://enterit.cz/reseni-pracovni-vykazy.html): automated work timesheet/report generation.

## Languages

Every core page has an equivalent under /en/, /de/, /pl/ (subpages) or as en.html, de.html, pl.html (homepage). Use hreflang links in each page's <head> to find the right language version.
